title: Rich Springy Uruguayan Chwinamul Fritters
description: A yeasty and comforting Uruguayan dish featuring chwinamul, deep-fried to perfection, and friendly to egg-free diets. This recipe is a twist on traditional Uruguayan cuisine, incorporating Asian ingredients like chwinamul.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, salt, sugar, and chwinamul.
Gradually add the water to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Cover the bowl with a damp cloth and let the mixture rest in a warm place for 1 hour, or until it has doubled in size.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the hot oil, being careful not to overcrowd the pan.
Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Sprinkle the fritters with garlic powder and onion powder to taste.
Serve the fritters hot and enjoy.
